title: Molecular epidemiology of infectious bursal disease virus in the Near East and Persian Gulf regions.
author_string: Legnardi, Matteo, Poletto, Francesca, Alam, Safaa, Cherfane, Abdallah, Le-Tallec, Bertrand et al.
journal_full: Avian pathology : journal of the W.V.P.A
abstract: Different field IBDVs were found to circulate in the Near and Middle East.Multiple atypical genotypes (A3B1, A4B1, A6B1) were found to circulate extensively.Traditional very virulent IBDVs (A3B2) were a minority of the detected strains.Viral exchanges can be hypothesized between the region and different continents.
